businessSummary.oneLiner: Leading AI data analytics platform for government and enterprise, built on the Gotham, Foundry, and AIP trifecta
businessSummary.description: Palantir builds AI data analytics platforms for government and enterprise clients. FY2025 revenue $4.48B (+60%). US commercial revenue surpassed $650M (Q4 +137% YoY). Pentagon adopted Maven AI as an official program of record for military-wide deployment. Selected as software developer for the $185B Golden Dome missile defense project. Today surged +6.2% on Stellantis 5-year renewal, IRS contract, and macro rally.
howTheyMakeMoney: Enterprise AI Platform (Foundry) - Large enterprise data integration
AIP (AI Platform) - Generative AI integration platform
AIP Bootcamps - Short-term onboarding programs for customer conversion

keyMetrics.name: Trailing P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: Today's +6.2% surge expanded P/E further. IT sector average 34x, making PLTR 6.7x the sector premium

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E (FY2026E)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Based on FY2026 EPS estimate of $1.22. Still 3x the growth stock average of 30-40x

keyMetrics.name: Revenue Growth (FY2026E)
keyMetrics.interpretation: From FY2025 $4.48B to FY2026 $7.40B projected. Enterprise segment is the core growth engine

keyMetrics.name: Stellantis 5-Year Renewal (3/31 Today)
keyMetrics.interpretation: StockStory: 5-year renewal and expansion with the world's 4th largest automaker. AIP adoption expanded. Core catalyst for +6.2% surge

keyMetrics.name: IRS $1.8M Contract
keyMetrics.interpretation: StockStory: IRS pays $1.8M for audit target identification tool development. Government expansion beyond defense

keyMetrics.name: Michael Burry Short Cover Hint
keyMetrics.interpretation: Benzinga: Burry held $900M in PLTR puts in 2025. Now hinting at position closure. Major short seller exit

growthDrivers.title: Stellantis 5-Year Partnership Renewal + AIP Adoption (3/31, Today)
growthDrivers.description: StockStory: Stellantis adds AIP to existing Foundry deployment in a 5-year renewal. Key proof point for enterprise AI platform expansion. Core catalyst for +6.2% surge

growthDrivers.title: IRS $1.8M Contract (3/31)
growthDrivers.description: StockStory: US Internal Revenue Service pays $1.8M for audit target identification and tax collection tools. Government expansion beyond defense

growthDrivers.title: Michael Burry Hints at Short Cover (3/31)
growthDrivers.description: Benzinga: 'Shorts are not forever.' $900M PLTR put position may be closed. Major short seller exit reduces downside pressure

growthDrivers.title: S&P +2.45%, Nasdaq +3.34% Massive Rally (3/31)
growthDrivers.description: Trump war-ending signal drives macro stabilization. Tech stocks rally broadly. PLTR +6.2% outperforms market

growthDrivers.title: Mizuho Outperform $195 + Citi $260 (3/31)
growthDrivers.description: 247WallSt: Citi Tyler Radke $260 (+78%), Wedbush $230 (+57%), Mizuho $195 Outperform. Oversold analysis

growthDrivers.title: Golden Dome $185B + Maven Official Adoption = War-Agnostic Long-term Contracts
growthDrivers.description: Pentagon Maven is now a program of record. Golden Dome is missile defense infrastructure. Long-term demand regardless of war outcome

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 20+ years of government defense AI track record, top-tier security clearances, Maven military-wide adoption, combat-proven in Iran operations

moats.description: Ontology platform deeply integrated into government/military systems. Replacement costs are prohibitively high
Top-level security clearances and 20+ years of government trust. New entrants cannot replicate
Used for real-time targeting in Iran operations. Maven official adoption locks in long-term demand
AIP Bootcamps enable rapid customer acquisition and Ontology data model ecosystem expansion

competitors.name: Anduril Industries
competitors.detail: Defense AI/drone startup. Collaborates with Palantir on Golden Dome

competitors.name: Snowflake / Databricks
competitors.detail: Enterprise data platform competition. Significantly behind in government access

competitors.name: Microsoft / AWS
competitors.detail: Cloud giants pushing into government AI. Deep integration remains difficult

recentNews.headline: 247WallSt: 'Oversold, Is Citi's $260 (+78%) Target Realistic?'
recentNews.significance: Down 30% from highs, today's +6.2% bounce. Citi $260, Wedbush $230 maintained. AIP as enterprise AI standard

recentNews.headline: S&P +2.45%, Nasdaq +3.34%. Trump War-Ending Signal
recentNews.significance: Macro stabilization drives tech rally. Defense premium erosion vs tech rally rebalance. PLTR responds more to the latter

recentNews.significance: Enterprise AI growth (Q4 +137%) offsets defense dependency. Maven, Golden Dome are war-agnostic long-term contracts

analystOpinions.notableComment: Citi $260 (+78%), Wedbush $230 (+57%), Mizuho $195 Outperform. Today's +6.2% bounce narrows target gap. 17 Buy, 5 Sell shows divided opinion

risks.title: P/E 228x, Valuation Justification Challenge
risks.description: Today's surge expanded P/E further. 6.7x the IT sector average of 34x. Valuation pressure persists even with reduced war premium

risks.title: War Ending May Resume Defense Premium Erosion
risks.description: Today's +6.2% was driven by tech rally, but actual war ending could weaken the defense narrative

risks.title: Peter Thiel + Executives Selling Continuously in March
risks.description: TradingKey: Thiel and executives sold shares throughout March. Burry may cover shorts but insiders keep selling

risks.title: Analyst Opinion Split (17 Buy, 5 Sell)
risks.description: 5 Sell ratings indicate persistent market skepticism about valuation

risks.title: Burry's Actual Position Unclear
risks.description: Benzinga: Actual positions only visible via 13F filings. 'Victory' claim may not mean actual closure

buyReasons.title: Stellantis 5-Year + IRS + Burry Short Cover = Compound Catalyst
buyReasons.rationale: Enterprise (Stellantis AIP), government (IRS), market (Burry short cover), and macro (war ending) all converged. +6.2% outperforms Nasdaq

buyReasons.title: Enterprise AI Revenue Explosion (Q4 +137%), Reducing Defense Dependency
buyReasons.rationale: Commercial revenue surge means growth engine is intact regardless of war outcome. Stellantis 5-year renewal proves it

buyReasons.title: Citi $260 (+78%), Wedbush $230 (+57%) Maintained
buyReasons.rationale: Oversold bounce beginning. AIP as enterprise AI standard long-term thesis unchanged

buyReasons.title: Maven, Golden Dome = War-Agnostic Long-term Contracts
buyReasons.rationale: Even if war ends, Maven is a program of record and Golden Dome is missile defense infrastructure

overallOpinion: Today's +6.2% surge recovered half of the 3-day -12% decline in a single session. Stellantis 5-year renewal (AIP expansion), IRS contract, war-ending signal, and Burry short cover all acted simultaneously. PLTR outperformed both S&P +2.45% and Nasdaq +3.34%

While war ending does reduce the defense premium, today's market reaction shows PLTR being re-rated from 'defense stock' to 'tech stock.' Stellantis AIP adoption reinforced the enterprise AI narrative, and Burry's short cover hint reduced downside pressure

At $146.09, just 3% below the 50-day SMA ($149). RSI recovered from 38 to 44. Maven and Golden Dome are war-agnostic long-term contracts. Citi $260 (+78%). Hold, upgrading toward Buy. Enter on 50-day SMA breakout confirmation

investmentVerdict.summary: +6.2% surge signals oversold bounce. Stellantis 5-year (enterprise AI), IRS (government expansion), Burry short cover (reduced downside), and macro rally all converged. Re-rating from defense to tech stock underway, but P/E 228x and Thiel selling remain concerns. Evaluate for Buy upgrade on 50-day SMA breakout
